body:
Getting to the White House.
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976b69/2ae112ef/12e3890a/357d5603/2516399306/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976b69/2ae112ef/12e3890a/357d5603/2516399306/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter, after my town hall in battleground Michigan today, I'm more fired up and clear-eyed than ever before about how we'll win in 2020. We have to repeat what happened today: connecting with people, hearing their stories and sharing how we'll fight for them.
**When we bring people together, we can overcome all odds to win the primary and then the White House.**
I'm running as a mom with young boys fighting for America to value women and help every family provide a bright future for their children. I'm running to restore power to the people, because your voice should be louder than the Koch brothers'. **The first step is getting on the national debate stage and sharing our brave agenda with the entire country.**
**[We can guarantee our spot in the debates with donations from 65,000 individual Americans. Giving any amount is the single most important thing you can do to power our movement, raise our voices and defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976b69/2ae112ef/12e3890a/357d5602/2516399306/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5NDAtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2940-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Here's the link to give right now: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976b69/2ae112ef/12e3890a/357d5602/2516399306/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5NDAtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2940-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Americans are counting on their elected leaders to face challenges directly and fearlessly--to keep their children safe from gun violence, fight climate change to protect our air and water and ensure opportunity belongs to everyone. As president, I will do exactly that.
I'm not accepting a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs or an individual Super PAC. I'm counting on you to donate now to fuel this community-led movement for change.

# We have 12 days to reach our goal!

Friends,

Campaigns are ramping up across the country for what might be one of the biggest elections of our lifetime and our district is no exception. Last year our campaign had just 9 short months to run our campaign before election day and we managed to gain significant ground in that time. This time around we have almost two full years to put in all of the groundwork needed to turn this district blue.

We need your help to make our dream a reality, together we can bring the concerns of working families to Washington. Our goal is to raise $5,000 by the end of the quarter, which is in just 12 days. Can we count on you to [donate today](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=e872efc957&e=c56804a14d) so that we can bring a progressive voice to Washington?

Thank you so much for your support.

Your friend,

_Ian A. Todd_

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: No one is off limits
body:
| | Peter, For years, individual religious liberty has been trampled in our nation in the name of “tolerance.” This politically correct battle continues and today, our elderly and youth are in the cross-hairs. Artis, an 84-year old woman living in a California Veterans home, was threatened with eviction. What was her offense? Hosting a voluntary Bible Study with the chaplaincy program, a gathering she has held there at the home for much of the past decade. Her challenges began when officials said her comments about heaven and hell caused another resident to “lose sleep.” Therefore, they classified Artis’ conversation with the resident as “elder abuse, emotional abuse, and otherwise illegal.” **So now you can’t say anything that might distress someone else? Because someone doesn’t want to hear about heaven and a hell, Artis suddenly loses her First Amendment Rights?** And Gabby, a high school student in Ohio, also experienced the double standard regarding religious liberty and free speech. The school suspended her for posting Bible verses on lockers in response to LGBT “pride” flags permitted to line the school’s hallways. **It seems that not all free speech is banned, only Christians’ free speech.** Let’s be clear. Religious freedom does not merely mean Christians are free to believe, to preach, and to worship in the ways they see fit, though it does certainly mean that. It also means Christians can live their lives in accordance with the Gospel, sharing the Gospel as we are commanded. **[This is why the work of My Faith Votes is so essential. If Christians in our nation fall silent, our country will continue into an irreversible decline](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e190319apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190319apl01nd&n=1).** John Adams said it best, “Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious people. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.” Yet millions of Christians fail to see the important connection between their faith and their vote. **My Faith Votes is working to reverse this dangerous trend by activating Christians to __pray__ , __think biblically__ , and __vote__.** This is not the time to disengage. It’s not the time to sit back. Millions remain apathetic and must be reached to win the ongoing battles for religious freedom. In 2019 alone, there are over 81,000 elections taking place across the country! That is a lot of impact we can have at the ballot box. You’ve made the commitment to stand boldly. Now take the next step. I want to challenge you to make a donation today to help reach and activate others. [Your donation will allow us to mobilize and equip people to protect religious freedom at the local, state and federal level so that men, women, and children are not punished or penalized for acting on their faith](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e190319apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190319apl01nd&n=2). Consider making a recurring gift of any amount. We need both your prayers and financial support in this ongoing battle if we hope to activate 90-million Christians in America to stand boldly for religious liberty. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e190319apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190319apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190319apl01nd&n=4)
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is my message
body:
Do something brave.
| | |
---
Peter, as a country, we need to remember what it feels like to be brave.

Brave doesn't pit people against each other or put money over lives. It doesn't spread hate, cloud truth or build a wall.

That's what fear does. That's what cowardice does. That's what Donald Trump does.
**It 's time to show that brave wins, and I told Americans who joined me last night for a town hall in Michigan what they could expect from my presidency:**

We'll end gun violence by defeating the NRA and changing our laws. We'll save our planet from climate change by taking on the fossil fuel lobby and passing a Green New Deal. We'll get big, unaccountable dark money out of our politics, because it's the only way you'll know your government's working for you.
This is my message--it's what I shared last night at our town hall. It's a message I'll take across the country. And I'll take it to the national debate stage, but we need donations from 65,000 individual Americans to secure a spot, and I need you to be one of them now.
**[Click here to give $5, or any amount, to make the debate stage and fight for a brave future. Our message wins everywhere--we just need resources to take it to the people.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976b7f/2ae112ef/12f6ab6b/357d50d2/2066582320/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MDAtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2900-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Nearly a million people have viewed our announcement. Millions more watched last night. And our fundraising is getting stronger.

It all tells me that what Americans want desperately is the thing that's gone missing: bravery. I've always led with it, and as your president, I'll do what's brave and what's right.
Thank you!

Kirsten

My name is James Mackler. I'm a husband, a father, a man of faith, a U.S. Army veteran, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Tennessee.
| |
---
| |
---
| You are receiving this message because of your previous support of Tennesee Democrats. If you don't want to receive updates, [**_please click here to unsubscribe._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2ed/18d6a294/493f6d6f/26d6bf77/1759725095/VEsH/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/unsubscribe/") | []({Link})
---
Friends,
My name is James Mackler. I'm a husband, a father, a man of faith, a U.S. Army veteran, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Tennessee.
One thing you learn in the military is that true leadership comes from a sense of duty. You don't work for yourself, you work for the benefit of others -- and you work with anyone you can to achieve your goals, regardless of which side of the aisle they sit on.
Unfortunately, that's not what we see in Washington these days. There's a complete lack of respect, honesty, and integrity. True leaders hold themselves and others accountable for their actions. Few in Washington do that.
**And I'll be honest with you -- I'm worried.** I'm worried about the future of my family and yours. My wife and I want to raise our girls in a nation that celebrates diversity, where our leaders respect each other and lead with integrity. I'm running for Senate because I want to help build that future.
I've taken a pledge to not take any corporate PAC money, so this campaign is built by supporters like you. I can't do this without your help.
We have a pathway to victory -- and that requires a network of concerned, engaged, and dedicated supporters. You can stay up to date with our travels across the state by following us on Facebook and Twitter.
[Facebook](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2ed/18d6a294/493f6d6f/26d6bf74/1759725095/VEsE/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/or190318fb")
---
[Twitter](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2ed/18d6a294/493f6d6f/26d6bf75/1759725095/VEsF/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/or190318tw")
---
We can only win this election as a team. And if we're going to have the strength, we need to start now.
I'll be in touch with updates as we move forward. I'm looking forward to a vigorous campaign, and I hope I can count on you to be with me.
James

---
| | |
# **White House Seeks Ways to Get More People to Work**

“The White House in a new report highlighted the strength of the labor-force participation rate and pushed for policies to encourage more people to work as millions of baby boomers retire,” Sarah Chaney reports in _The Wall Street Journal_.

Contributing to this stable participation rate: “strong labor demand, shown by 101 straight months of job growth, according to Labor Department data.”

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2942be9cd6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Americans give the nation's economy glowing reviews in a new CNN Poll conducted by SSRS, and Donald Trump's approval rating may be reaping the benefits,” Jennifer Agiesta reports for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ecca9a865&e=3ee4985eea). “Overall, 71% say the nation's economy is in good shape, the highest share to say so since February 2001, and the best rating during Trump's presidency by two points.”

**More:[President Trump’s 2019 economic report released this morning ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35eab7b8ae&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
| “The White House said Monday it wants to reform higher education by imposing ‘common-sense’ limits on how much parents and graduate students may borrow, saying it will pressure institutions to keep tuition down, while extending Pell Grants and the work-study programs to students who want to get skills outside the traditional two-or-four-year college track,” Tom Howell Jr. reports for _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=635d357695&e=3ee4985eea)_.

**Watch:[Ivanka Trump says it’s time to modernize higher ed ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cfc54fb30f&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
| Yesterday, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) and White House Office of National Drug Control Policy Director Jim Carroll visited the Volunteers of America Mid-States addiction recovery center in Louisville, Lisa Gillespie reports for [WFPL](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6552e5f47&e=3ee4985eea). Director Carroll added that another key part of “the Trump Administration’s plan to thwart drug use is the potential wall that would separate parts of the U.S. from Mexico.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump donated a quarter of his salary to the Department of Homeland Security on Monday and tweeted out a photo of the check to prove it,” Leah Barkoukis reports in _[Townhall](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c79a416352&e=3ee4985eea)_. “While the press doesn't like writing about it, nor do I need them to, I donate my yearly Presidential salary of $400,000.00 to different agencies throughout the year,” President Trump wrote.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e7bba2ec3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d9ce5414a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8f53719daf)

name: Kamala 2020
subject: FWD: Where do you stand on the death penalty?
body:
As
president, Kamala would lead the fight to end the federal death penalty.
Not only is it an immoral practice: it’s ineffective and costly for
American taxpayers.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/end-death-penalty-a?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190319-A-2-test&source=ema190319-A-2-test&t=1001&akid=3406%2E5755789%2EKOqYX2 ]We need you to make your voice heard today. If you stand with Kamala in
support of ending the death penalty, add your name to our petition today.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/end-death-penalty-a?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190319-A-2-test&source=ema190319-A-2-test&t=1002&akid=3406%2E5755789%2EKOqYX2 ]Sign the petition

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original message from Kamala Harris, March 18, 2019

I’ve long been opposed to the death penalty. It is deeply immoral,
irreversible, and ineffective. And if we are going to transform our
country’s broken criminal justice system, we must be fearless -- unafraid
to speak hard truths.

Last week, my home state of California issued a moratorium on the death
penalty -- a system that has proven time and again to be an abject
failure. It has wasted taxpayer money, has not kept our communities safe,
and has discriminated against those with mental illness and people of
color.

This is an important step forward. But I believe we must take it one step
further and abolish the federal death penalty. This failed system is
immoral, and as president I would lead the fight to end it. It’s simply
the right thing to do.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/end-death-penalty-a?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190319-A-2-test&source=ema190319-A-2-test&t=1003&akid=3406%2E5755789%2EKOqYX2 ]It is up to each and every one of us as citizens of this country to
stand up for justice. That is why I’m asking for your voice today. Join me
in calling for an end to the death penalty nationwide.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/end-death-penalty-a?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190319-A-2-test&source=ema190319-A-2-test&t=1004&akid=3406%2E5755789%2EKOqYX2 ]Sign the petition

Let’s be clear: as a former prosecutor, I absolutely and strongly believe
there should be serious and swift consequences when one person kills
another. I am unequivocal in that belief. We can -- and we should --
always pursue justice in the name of victims and give dignity to the
families that grieve.

But in our democracy, a death sentence carried out by the government does
not constitute justice for those who have been put to death and proven
innocent after the fact.

It is up to us to speak some hard truths about this immoral practice. The
data tells us that as many as 1 in 10 people prosecuted with a death
penalty conviction has been exonerated.

The data also shows us that the death penalty is far more likely to be
carried out against people of color, people with mental illness, and
people who could not afford to pay for legal counsel at trial.

schools, in our health care, and in lifting up our communities.

We have a lot of work to do to pass meaningful criminal justice reform in

[ ]Sign the petition Original message from Kamala Harris, March 18, 2019 I’ve long been opposed to the death penalty. It is deeply immoral, irreversible, and ineffective. And if we are going to transform our country’s broken criminal justice system, we must be fearless -- unafraid to speak hard truths. Last week, my home state of California issued a moratorium on the death penalty -- a system that has proven time and again to be an abject failure. It has wasted taxpayer money, has not kept our communities safe, and has discriminated against those with mental illness and people of color. This is an important step forward. But I believe we must take it one step further and abolish the federal death penalty. This failed system is immoral, and as president I would lead the fight to end it. It’s simply the right thing to do. [ ]It is up to each and every one of us as citizens of this country to stand up for justice. That is why I’m asking for your voice today. Join me in calling for an end to the death penalty nationwide. I am unequivocal in that belief. We can -- and we should -- always pursue justice in the name of victims and give dignity to the families that grieve. But in our democracy, a death sentence carried out by the government does not constitute justice for those who have been put to death and proven innocent after the fact. It is up to us to speak some hard truths about this immoral practice. The data tells us that as many as 1 in 10 people prosecuted with a death penalty conviction has been exonerated. subject: This morning Tom Emmer announced he is having a town hall... tonight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# Emmer will be in Cokato this evening.

Last year I hosted more than 20 town halls and went to every single county in the district, all while Tom Emmer had gone nearly two full years without a single town hall. Now that 2018 has passed he is dealing with this town hall problem in a different way, he makes them impossible to attend.

Today Tom Emmer announced that he will be hosting a [town hall this evening](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=bf683545d5&e=c56804a14d) giving members of our community very little time to plan our schedules. Many parents will not be able to rearrange a busy school night in order to bring up their concerns about our education system. People with disabilities and people without reliable transportation might not be able to arrange transportation so that they can bring their concerns about the difficulty of transportation, and the lack of accommodation for people living with disabilities.

These types of antics are not a reflection of our Minnesotan values. Last minute changes to schedules and same day announcements are signals to the working families of CD6 that they are not being taken into consideration. If Tom Emmer won't take the needs of working families into consideration when scheduling town halls, he certainly won't be taking them into consideration in Washington.

Its time that we bring the needs of working families to the forefront of the political dialogue and ensure that no person is being left behind or ignored. I am running because I believe that together, we can lift up the voices of working families. Can I count on your [support](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=27d77081db&e=c56804a14d)?

Your friend,

_Ian A. Todd_

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Protect Robert Mueller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
If President Trump's bullying tweets weren't evidence enough, his own personal lawyer testified to Congress about how the President bullies people into getting his way.
Now, I'm deeply concerned that he's using these same exact tactics against Special Counsel Robert Mueller in an effort to derail his investigation into Trump's Russian connections. Worse, I fear that the President is more concerned with protecting both his personal business interests and his reelection campaign than he is with preserving our democracy.
**The American people deserve to know the whole truth about Russian interference in the 2016 elections.**
But with President Trump working to undermine special counsel Robert Mueller's investigation into his ties to Russia, I'm calling on Congress to act to ensure an honest and transparent investigation and the release of the Mueller report.

subject: Ending the worst drug crisis in U.S. history
body:
Six months before Donald J. Trump was elected President, a group of health experts wrote a private letter with “an urgent plea”... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6763073003&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 19, 2019
---
| | |
# **Ending the worst drug crisis in U.S. history**

**Six months before** Donald J. Trump was elected President, a group of health experts wrote a private letter with “an urgent plea” to senior officials in the Obama Administration.

**“Thousands of people were dying** from overdoses of fentanyl — the deadliest drug to ever hit U.S. streets — and the [Obama] administration needed to take immediate action. The epidemic had been escalating for three years,” _[The Washington Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76f2803694&e=3ee4985eea)_ reported last week. “The administration considered the request but did not act on it.”

**When President Trump** took office 8 months later, the opioid crisis was devastating communities across the country. Nearly 64,000 Americans died from a drug overdose in 2016 alone. Opioid overdoses accounted for more than 42,000 of these deaths—more than any previous year on record.

**In October 2017** , President Trump declared the opioid crisis a public health emergency. And one year ago today, he introduced the Initiative to Stop Opioid Abuse, a historic effort to cut off the illicit drug supply and drive down demand in the United States.

**The results** should give all Americans hope:
* During the President’s first year in office, **68 percent fewer Americans** over the age of 26 began using heroin than during the previous year.

* In July 2017, the Department of Justice **shut down the country’s biggest Darknet distributor** of drugs. That same Fiscal Year, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement took more than 2,300 pounds of fentanyl off the streets.

* The Trump Administration’s **public awareness campaign** highlighting the dangers of opioid abuse has been seen by 58 percent of young Americans and 1.4 billion viewers in total.

**“We will liberate** our country from this crisis,” President Trump said last year when he unveiled his initiative. “And we will raise a drug-free generation of American children.”

**Under this President** , the carnage of America’s worst drug crisis will not be ignored.

**[President Trump’s nationwide call to action to end our opioid crisis.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b4d8e7fcc&e=3ee4985eea)**

**By the numbers:** **[How President Trump is helping America recover](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9313170f9a&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
## **Watch President Trump host Brazil’s new leader**

**Today,** President Trump welcomed the recently elected President of Brazil, Jair Bolsonaro, to the White House.

**President Bolsonaro’s election** marked a historic opportunity for the United States and Brazil—the two largest democracies in the Western Hemisphere—to build a new partnership focused on increased prosperity, strong security, and national sovereignty.

**Perhaps most important** , Brazil is a crucial ally in President Trump’s stand against the corrupt, socialist Maduro dictatorship in Venezuela. President Bolsonaro reiterated that Brazil stands with Venezuelan Interim President Juan Guaido, as well as with the democratically elected National Assembly and the Venezuelan people in their fight against tyranny.

**“The twilight hour** of socialism has arrived in our hemisphere,” President Trump said from the Rose Garden this afternoon. “And hopefully, by the way, it’s also arrived—that twilight hour—in our great country.”

**“I have always admired** the United States of America,” President Bolsonaro added. “And this sense of admiration has just increased after you took office.”

[Watch President Trump: “We have a truly historic chance.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=284ca4df29&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:[The full joint statement from the two leaders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=005a38849d&e=3ee4985eea)**

|
---
|
